title: General Cast Formula Composer Not Working
excerpt: When I click the link for formula in a template it is an email composer, not a formula composer.  Anyone know why this is?

posts.author: irish_535 (Jay Patrick Tobin)
posts.cookedHtml: When I click the link for formula in a template it is an email composer, not a formula composer. Anyone know why this is?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: There is no formula composer field for integration recipes at this time, you have to type it in and use the column selections in the email composer.

posts.author: irish_535 (Jay Patrick Tobin)
posts.cookedHtml: Type it in to the body of the email and that will run the formula?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, and you use the column/field picker at the bottom to pick the columns to use in the formula. Thats just how things are at this time.

For actually help with writing your formula you’ll want to check out their documentation first. since its different than monday formulas.

posts.author: irish_535 (Jay Patrick Tobin)
posts.cookedHtml: Interesting, thank you very much I will give this a shot.
